title: My intelligence system just lit up on GLD
author: BuildwithPublic
selftext:
GLD: +3.27 signal(top 5% all year)

Here's what's interesting: SPY-GLD correlation just collapsed to +0.14 (basically decorr). Gold is moving independently of equities right now.

Instead of buying calls (paying theta), I'm selling puts below support and collecting premium while the uptrend develops.

Purely Hypothetical structure:

* SELL GLD 465P / BUY GLD 460P
* Collect \~$1.50 credit
* \+$150/day theta income
* Max profit if GLD stays above 465

The thesis:  
\-Multi-timeframe momentum alignment  
\-Low correlation to SPY (independent move)  
\-Positive theta while participating in upside  
\-High probability trade (selling OTM puts in uptrend)

This is systematic options trading:

* Algorithm detects regime opportunity
* Structure optimizes risk/reward
* Trading API executes in 80ms
* Time decay works for me, not against me
* Multi-leg execution (both puts fill simultaneously 80ms)
* Getting paid .10c rebates instead of fees
* Real-time position management
* No slippage from clicking buttons

comments.author: Big-Kangaroo-7145
comments.body: That +3.27 signal is a beast. Selling Puts instead of fighting Theta in this uptrend? Clean execution.

replies.author: BuildwithPublic
replies.body: it was pretty strong for sure- wonder if SPY GLD start correlating again now

comments.author: steelmasjien
comments.body: Intelligence system xD keep telling yourself that

comments.author: Legitimate_Pay_865
comments.body: Everyones a genius in a bull market. Just need to see how it functions when everything goes chaotic, unpredictable and trending downwards...

replies.author: BuildwithPublic
replies.body: mkts hve been pretty chaotic over past few months

comments.author: FreeUnicorn4u
comments.body: What's all the squiggles in the middle? 😅

replies.author: BuildwithPublic
replies.body: Thats tracking phase space embedding- hidden market states

replies.author: Killahbeez
replies.body: lol dude i dunno its AI bro it operates on levels beyond (above) reason

replies.author: BuildwithPublic
replies.body: This is a real model- LLM is just layered into deterministic process. Building/executing on real models was just made more accessible by integrating LLMs with APIs. You can take any concept, turn it into a process engine with data  then take it to backtesting/execution with very little friction now.

replies.author: BuildwithPublic
replies.body: What would you have titled it?

comments.author: Horror_Day_8073
comments.body: The squiggles are cute, but it needs to tell me which Call or Put to buy!

replies.author: BuildwithPublic
replies.body: The core engine pulls strikes -scores on IV fit, GEX, momentum, options flow

replies.author: Horror_Day_8073
replies.body: Thanks for responding I was trying to find this thread again! Going to give it a try.
